Bash(php artisan tinker --execute="
\\$checks = [
    'app.name' => config\('app.name'\),
    'app.faker_locale' => config\('app.faker_locale'\),
    'app.maintenance.driver' => config\('app.maintenance.driver'\),
    'session.driver' => config\('session.driver'\),
    'cache.default' => config\('cache.default'\),
    'queue.default' => config\('queue.default'\),
    'logging.default' => config\('logging.default'\),
    'pennant.default' => config\('pennant.default'\),
    'tenancy.enabled' => config\('tenancy.enabled'\),
    'tenancy.domain' => config\('tenancy.domain'\),
    'tenancy.subdomain_resolution' => config\('tenancy.subdomain_resolution'\),
    'honeypot.name_field_name' => config\('honeypot.name_field_name'\),
    'csp.enabled_while_hot_reloading' => config\('csp.enabled_while_hot_reloading'\),
    'horizon.path' => config\('horizon.path'\),
];
foreach \(\\$checks as \\$key => \\$val\) {
    echo \\$key . ': ' . var_export\(\\$val, true\) . PHP_EOL;
}
" 2>&1)
